12	/-!
13	# The Serre twisting sheaf `O(m)` on the integral model of projective space
14	
15	Mathlib v4.31 has no twisted structure sheaf on `Proj`.  This file constructs
16	`O(m)` on the integral model `Proj ℤ[Xᵢ : i ∈ n]` of projective space as a
17	`SheafOfModules`, by gluing the trivial line bundles on the basic opens
18	`D₊(Xᵢ)` along the transition units `(Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m`, through the project descent
19	engine `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.glue` (`Picard/GlueDescent.lean`) —
20	the same pattern as the Grassmannian universal quotient
21	(`Picard/GrassmannianQuot.lean`), in rank one.
22	
23	Main definitions:
24	
25	* `ProjTwist.basicOpenCover n` — the open cover of `Proj ℤ[Xᵢ]` by the
26	  `D₊(Xᵢ)`;
27	* `ProjTwist.awayUnit n i j` — the unit `Xᵢ/Xⱼ` of the degree-zero localized
28	  ring `(ℤ[Xᵢ]_{XᵢXⱼ})₀`, and `ProjTwist.overlapUnit n i j` its image in
29	  `Γ(V(i,j), O)` on the scheme-theoretic overlap of the cover;
30	* `ProjTwist.twistTransition n m i j` — the rank-one transition isomorphism
31	  multiplication by `(Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m`, conjugated by the structure-sheaf pullback
32	  comparison `Modules.pullbackUnitIso`;
33	* `ProjTwist.serreTwist n m` — `O(m)` on `Proj ℤ[Xᵢ : i ∈ n]`, the glued
34	  sheaf of modules transported along the cover isomorphism `fromGlued`.
35	
36	The convention is that the transition *from* the `i`-th trivialisation *to*
37	the `j`-th multiplies by `(Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m`, corresponding to the local generator
38	`Xᵢ^m` of `O(m)` on `D₊(Xᵢ)`.
39	
40	Blueprint: `def:serre_twist`, `lem:serre_twist_transition_unit`,
41	`lem:serre_twist_cocycle` (`blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex`).
42	-/

44	open CategoryTheory Limits MvPolynomial HomogeneousLocalization
45	open AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian (scalarEnd scalarEnd_one scalarEnd_comp)
46	
47	noncomputable section
48	
49	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
50	
51	universe u
52	
53	/-! ## Rank-one pullback coherences
54	
55	The Serre-twist cocycle transports rank-one transition isomorphisms of the shape
56	`pullbackUnitIso a ≪≫ unitScalarIso v ≪≫ (pullbackUnitIso b).symm` to a triple
57	overlap.  The next block is the rank-one mirror of the free-sheaf coherence stack
58	of `GrassmannianQuot.lean` / `GlueDescent.lean` (`pullbackFreeIso_comp`,
59	`matrixEnd_pullback`, the `pullbackCongr` endpoint absorptions): with
60	`SheafOfModules.unit` in place of `SheafOfModules.free (Fin d)`, `scalarEnd` in
61	place of `matrixEnd`, and `pullbackUnitIso` in place of `pullbackFreeIso`.  Each
62	is immediate from an already-proven unit-level atom. -/
63	
64	namespace Scheme.Modules
65	
66	open AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian (scalarEnd scalarEnd_pullback)
67	
68	/-- Rank-one `map_comp` coherence (analogue of `pullbackFreeIso_comp`): the
69	structure-sheaf pullback comparison at a composite `b ≫ a` factors through the
70	pseudofunctor composition `pullbackComp`.  Immediate from the unit coherence
71	`gr_pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` (`(pullbackUnitIso f).hom = pullbackObjUnitToUnit f`). -/
72	lemma pullbackUnitIso_comp {Tx Ty Tz : Scheme.{u}} (a : Ty ⟶ Tx) (b : Tz ⟶ Ty) :
73	    (pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
74	        (pullbackUnitIso (b ≫ a)).hom
75	      = (pullback b).map (pullbackUnitIso a).hom ≫ (pullbackUnitIso b).hom :=
76	  gr_pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp a b
77	
78	/-- Iso-conjugated form of the scalar-endomorphism pullback atom `scalarEnd_pullback`:
79	`(pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) = Q.hom ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a) ≫ Q.inv`, with
80	`Q = pullbackUnitIso p`.  The rank-one analogue of `matrixEnd_pullback`. -/
81	lemma scalarEnd_pullback_iso {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) (a : Γ(S, ⊤)) :
82	    (pullback p).map (scalarEnd a)
83	      = (pullbackUnitIso p).hom ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a) ≫ (pullbackUnitIso p).inv := by
84	  have key : (pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫ (pullbackUnitIso p).hom
85	      = (pullbackUnitIso p).hom ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a) :=
86	    scalarEnd_pullback p a
87	  rw [← Category.assoc, ← key, Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id, Category.comp_id]
88	
89	/-- Closed zig-zag: `Q_φ⁻¹ ≫ pullbackCongr(h).app ≫ Q_ψ = 𝟙` for equal base
90	morphisms `φ = ψ`.  Rank-one mirror of `pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr_hom`. -/
91	@[reassoc]
92	lemma pullbackUnitIso_inv_congr_hom {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ) :
93	    (pullbackUnitIso φ).inv ≫
94	        ((pullbackCongr h).app (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)).hom ≫
95	        (pullbackUnitIso ψ).hom
96	      = 𝟙 _ := by
97	  subst h; simp [pullbackCongr]
98	
99	/-- Left absorption: `pullbackCongr(h).app ≫ Q_ψ = Q_φ` for equal base morphisms
100	`φ = ψ`.  Rank-one mirror of `pullbackCongr_hom_app_free`. -/
101	@[reassoc]
102	lemma pullbackCongr_hom_app_unit {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ) :
103	    ((pullbackCongr h).app (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)).hom ≫
104	        (pullbackUnitIso ψ).hom
105	      = (pullbackUnitIso φ).hom := by
106	  subst h; simp [pullbackCongr]
107	
108	/-- Right absorption: `Q_φ⁻¹ ≫ pullbackCongr(h).app = Q_ψ⁻¹` for equal base
109	morphisms `φ = ψ`.  Rank-one mirror of `pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr`. -/
110	@[reassoc]
111	lemma pullbackUnitIso_inv_congr {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ) :
112	    (pullbackUnitIso φ).inv ≫
113	        ((pullbackCongr h).app (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)).hom
114	      = (pullbackUnitIso ψ).inv := by
115	  subst h; simp [pullbackCongr]
116	
117	end Scheme.Modules
118	
119	namespace ProjTwist
120	
121	variable (n : Type u)
122	
123	/-- The variable `Xᵢ` is homogeneous of degree `1`. -/
124	lemma X_mem_deg_one (i : n) :
125	    (X i : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) ∈ homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ) 1 :=
126	  isHomogeneous_X _ _
127	
128	/-- The product `XᵢXⱼ` is homogeneous of degree `2`. -/
129	lemma X_mul_X_mem_deg_two (i j : n) :
130	    (X i * X j : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) ∈
131	      homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ) 2 :=
132	  SetLike.mul_mem_graded (X_mem_deg_one n i) (X_mem_deg_one n j)
133	
134	/-- The basic opens `D₊(Xᵢ)` cover `Proj ℤ[Xᵢ : i ∈ n]`: the variables
135	generate the coordinate ring over its degree-zero part. -/
136	lemma iSup_basicOpen_X_eq_top :
137	    ⨆ i, Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i) = ⊤ := by
138	  refine Proj.iSup_basicOpen_eq_top' _ _ (fun i => ⟨1, X_mem_deg_one n i⟩) ?_
139	  rw [eq_top_iff]
140	  rintro a -
141	  have ha : a ∈ Algebra.adjoin (ULift.{u} ℤ)
142	      (Set.range (X : n → MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ))) := by
143	    rw [MvPolynomial.adjoin_range_X]; trivial
144	  induction ha using Algebra.adjoin_induction with
145	  | mem x hx => exact Algebra.subset_adjoin hx
146	  | algebraMap r =>
147	      have hr : (algebraMap (ULift.{u} ℤ) (MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ))) r
148	          ∈ homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ) 0 := by
149	        rw [MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq]
150	        exact isHomogeneous_C _ _
151	      exact Subalgebra.algebraMap_mem
152	        (Algebra.adjoin (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ) 0)
153	          (Set.range (X : n → MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ))))
154	        (⟨_, hr⟩ : homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ) 0)
155	  | add x y _ _ hx hy => exact add_mem hx hy
156	  | mul x y _ _ hx hy => exact mul_mem hx hy
157	
158	/-- The open cover of the integral model by the basic opens `D₊(Xᵢ)`. -/
159	def basicOpenCover :
160	    (Proj (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))).OpenCover where
161	  I₀ := n
162	  X i := (Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i)).toScheme
163	  f i := (Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i)).ι
164	  mem₀ := by
165	    rw [Scheme.presieve₀_mem_precoverage_iff]
166	    refine ⟨fun x => ?_, inferInstance⟩
167	    have : x ∈ ⨆ i, Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i) := by
168	      rw [iSup_basicOpen_X_eq_top]; trivial
169	    obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := TopologicalSpace.Opens.mem_iSup.mp this
170	    exact ⟨i, ⟨x, hi⟩, rfl⟩
171	
172	/-- The glue datum of the basic-open cover of the integral model. -/
173	@[reducible] def glueData : Scheme.GlueData.{u} := (basicOpenCover n).gluedCover
174	
175	/-- The fraction `Xᵢ/Xⱼ = Xᵢ²/(XᵢXⱼ)` as an element of the degree-zero
176	localized ring `(ℤ[X]_{XᵢXⱼ})₀`. -/
177	def awayFraction (i j : n) :
178	    Away (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j) :=
179	  Away.mk _ (X_mul_X_mem_deg_two n i j) 1 (X i * X i)
180	    (by simpa using X_mul_X_mem_deg_two n i i)
181	
182	/-- The fraction `Xⱼ/Xᵢ = Xⱼ²/(XᵢXⱼ)` in the *same* localized ring
183	`(ℤ[X]_{XᵢXⱼ})₀` — the inverse of `awayFraction`. -/
184	def awayFractionInv (i j : n) :
185	    Away (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j) :=
186	  Away.mk _ (X_mul_X_mem_deg_two n i j) 1 (X j * X j)
187	    (by simpa using X_mul_X_mem_deg_two n j j)
188	
189	lemma awayFraction_mul_inv (i j : n) :
190	    awayFraction n i j * awayFractionInv n i j = 1 := by
191	  apply HomogeneousLocalization.val_injective
192	  rw [HomogeneousLocalization.val_mul, HomogeneousLocalization.val_one,
193	    awayFraction, awayFractionInv, Away.val_mk, Away.val_mk, Localization.mk_mul]
194	  have hnum : (X i * X i) * (X j * X j)
195	      = ((X i * X j) ^ 1 * (X i * X j) ^ 1 : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) := by
196	    ring
197	  rw [hnum]
198	  exact Localization.mk_self
199	    ((⟨(X i * X j) ^ 1, 1, rfl⟩ :
200	        Submonoid.powers (X i * X j : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ))) *
201	      (⟨(X i * X j) ^ 1, 1, rfl⟩ :
202	        Submonoid.powers (X i * X j : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ))))
203	
204	/-- The fraction `Xᵢ/Xⱼ` as a unit of `(ℤ[X]_{XᵢXⱼ})₀`, with inverse
205	`Xⱼ/Xᵢ`. -/
206	def awayUnit (i j : n) :
207	    (Away (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j))ˣ where
208	  val := awayFraction n i j
209	  inv := awayFractionInv n i j
210	  val_inv := awayFraction_mul_inv n i j
211	  inv_val := (mul_comm _ _).trans (awayFraction_mul_inv n i j)
212	
213	/-! ## The transition units on the scheme-theoretic overlaps -/
214	
215	/-- The scheme-theoretic overlap of the glue datum factors through the basic
216	open `D₊(XᵢXⱼ) = D₊(Xᵢ) ⊓ D₊(Xⱼ)`. -/
217	lemma range_overlap_le (i j : n) :
218	    Set.range (pullback.fst ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f j) ≫
219	        (basicOpenCover n).f i).base ⊆
220	      Set.range ((Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))
221	        (X i * X j)).ι).base := by
222	  rw [Scheme.Opens.range_ι, Proj.basicOpen_mul]
223	  rintro _ ⟨v, rfl⟩
224	  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
225	  · have hx : ((pullback.fst _ _ ≫ (basicOpenCover n).f i) v : Proj _) ∈
226	        Set.range ⇑((Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))
227	          (X i)).ι) := by
228	      rw [Scheme.Hom.comp_apply]
229	      exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
230	    exact (Scheme.Opens.range_ι _) ▸ hx
231	  · have hcond := congrArg (fun (φ : pullback ((basicOpenCover n).f i)
232	        ((basicOpenCover n).f j) ⟶ Proj (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))) =>
233	          φ.base v) pullback.condition
234	    simp only at hcond
235	    rw [hcond]
236	    have hx : ((pullback.snd _ _ ≫ (basicOpenCover n).f j) v : Proj _) ∈
237	        Set.range ⇑((Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))
238	          (X j)).ι) := by
239	      rw [Scheme.Hom.comp_apply]
240	      exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
241	    exact (Scheme.Opens.range_ι _) ▸ hx
242	
243	/-- The canonical morphism from the scheme-theoretic overlap of the `i`-th and
244	`j`-th charts to the basic open `D₊(XᵢXⱼ)`. -/
245	def overlapHom (i j : n) :
246	    pullback ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f j) ⟶
247	      (Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j)).toScheme :=
248	  IsOpenImmersion.lift
249	    ((Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j)).ι)
250	    (pullback.fst ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f j) ≫
251	      (basicOpenCover n).f i)
252	    (range_overlap_le n i j)
253	
254	/-- The ring homomorphism carrying degree-zero fractions over `XᵢXⱼ` to
255	sections of the structure sheaf on the scheme-theoretic overlap. -/
256	def overlapRingHom (i j : n) :
257	    Away (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j) →+*
258	      Γ(pullback ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f j), ⊤) :=
259	  ((overlapHom n i j).appTop.hom.comp
260	    ((Proj.basicOpen (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ))
261	      (X i * X j)).topIso.inv.hom)).comp
262	    (Proj.awayToSection (homogeneousSubmodule n (ULift.{u} ℤ)) (X i * X j)).hom
263	
264	/-- The transition unit `(Xᵢ/Xⱼ)` as a unit of the sections of the structure
265	sheaf on the scheme-theoretic overlap of the `i`-th and `j`-th charts. -/
266	def overlapUnit (i j : n) :
267	    Γ(pullback ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f j), ⊤)ˣ :=
268	  Units.map (overlapRingHom n i j).toMonoidHom (awayUnit n i j)
269	
270	/-! ## Rank-one transitions -/
271	
272	/-- A unit of the global sections induces an automorphism of the structure
273	sheaf, multiplication by the unit (rank-one `matrixToFreeIso`). -/
274	def unitScalarIso {Y : Scheme.{u}} (v : Γ(Y, ⊤)ˣ) :
275	    SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf ≅ SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf where
276	  hom := scalarEnd v.val
277	  inv := scalarEnd v.inv
278	  hom_inv_id := by rw [scalarEnd_comp, v.val_inv, scalarEnd_one]
279	  inv_hom_id := by rw [scalarEnd_comp, v.inv_val, scalarEnd_one]
280	
281	@[simp]
282	lemma unitScalarIso_hom {Y : Scheme.{u}} (v : Γ(Y, ⊤)ˣ) :
283	    (unitScalarIso v).hom = scalarEnd v.val := rfl
284	
285	@[simp]
286	lemma unitScalarIso_one {Y : Scheme.{u}} :
287	    unitScalarIso (1 : Γ(Y, ⊤)ˣ) = Iso.refl _ :=
288	  Iso.ext (by rw [Iso.refl_hom]; exact (congrArg scalarEnd Units.val_one).trans scalarEnd_one)
289	
290	/-- Iso-level structure-sheaf-pullback cancellation: for equal base morphisms,
291	`pullbackUnitIso φ ≪≫ (pullbackUnitIso ψ).symm` is the `eqToIso` transport
292	(the rank-one analogue of `pullbackFreeIso_trans_symm_eqToIso`). -/
293	lemma pullbackUnitIso_trans_symm_eqToIso {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ) :
294	    Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso φ ≪≫ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ψ).symm
295	      = eqToIso (congrArg
296	          (fun α => (Scheme.Modules.pullback α).obj
297	            (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)) h) := by
298	  subst h; simp
299	
300	/-- The fraction `Xᵢ/Xᵢ` is `1`. -/
301	lemma awayFraction_self (i : n) : awayFraction n i i = 1 := by
302	  apply HomogeneousLocalization.val_injective
303	  rw [HomogeneousLocalization.val_one, awayFraction, Away.val_mk]
304	  have hden : (⟨(X i * X i) ^ 1, 1, rfl⟩ :
305	      Submonoid.powers (X i * X i : MvPolynomial n (ULift.{u} ℤ)))
306	      = ⟨X i * X i, 1, pow_one _⟩ := Subtype.ext (pow_one _)
307	  rw [hden]
308	  exact Localization.mk_self_mk _ _
309	
310	lemma awayUnit_self (i : n) : awayUnit n i i = 1 :=
311	  Units.ext (awayFraction_self n i)
312	
313	lemma overlapUnit_self (i : n) : overlapUnit n i i = 1 := by
314	  rw [overlapUnit, awayUnit_self, map_one]
315	
316	/-- The rank-one transition isomorphism of the Serre twist `O(m)`:
317	multiplication by `(Xᵢ/Xⱼ)^m`, conjugated by the structure-sheaf pullback
318	comparisons on the scheme-theoretic overlap. -/
319	def twistTransition (m : ℕ) (i j : n) :
320	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback ((glueData n).f i j)).obj
321	        (SheafOfModules.unit ((glueData n).U i).ringCatSheaf) ≅
322	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback ((glueData n).t i j ≫ (glueData n).f j i)).obj
323	        (SheafOfModules.unit ((glueData n).U j).ringCatSheaf) :=
324	  Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).f i j) ≪≫
325	    unitScalarIso ((overlapUnit n i j) ^ m) ≪≫
326	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).t i j ≫ (glueData n).f j i)).symm
327	
328	/-- **(C1)** The diagonal transition of the Serre twist is the canonical
329	cast: `Xᵢ/Xᵢ = 1`, so the scalar automorphism is the identity and the two
330	pullback comparisons cancel. -/
331	lemma twistTransition_self (m : ℕ) (i : n) :
332	    twistTransition n m i i
333	      = eqToIso (congrArg
334	          (fun φ => (Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj
335	            (SheafOfModules.unit ((glueData n).U i).ringCatSheaf))
336	          (show (glueData n).f i i = (glueData n).t i i ≫ (glueData n).f i i by
337	            rw [(glueData n).t_id i, Category.id_comp])) := by
338	  have hmid : unitScalarIso ((overlapUnit n i i) ^ m)
339	      = Iso.refl (SheafOfModules.unit
340	          (pullback ((basicOpenCover n).f i) ((basicOpenCover n).f i)).ringCatSheaf) := by
341	    rw [overlapUnit_self, one_pow, unitScalarIso_one]
342	  calc twistTransition n m i i
343	      = Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).f i i) ≪≫
344	          unitScalarIso ((overlapUnit n i i) ^ m) ≪≫
345	          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso
346	            ((glueData n).t i i ≫ (glueData n).f i i)).symm := rfl
347	    _ = Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).f i i) ≪≫
348	          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso
349	            ((glueData n).t i i ≫ (glueData n).f i i)).symm := by
350	        refine (congrArg (fun e =>
351	          Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).f i i) ≪≫ e ≪≫
352	            (Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso
353	              ((glueData n).t i i ≫ (glueData n).f i i)).symm) hmid).trans ?_
354	        exact congrArg (fun e => Scheme.Modules.pullbackUnitIso ((glueData n).f i i) ≪≫ e)
355	          (Iso.refl_trans _)
356	    _ = eqToIso (congrArg
357	          (fun φ => (Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj
358	            (SheafOfModules.unit ((glueData n).U i).ringCatSheaf))
359	          (show (glueData n).f i i = (glueData n).t i i ≫ (glueData n).f i i by
360	            rw [(glueData n).t_id i, Category.id_comp])) :=
361	      pullbackUnitIso_trans_symm_eqToIso

40	To state the triple-overlap multiplicativity (C2) of a module descent datum we must
41	transport each transition isomorphism `g_ij`, living on the overlap `V_ij`, to the common
42	triple overlap `V_ijk = V_ij ×_{U_i} V_ik`. The transport pulls `g_ij` back along a
43	projection `p : V_ijk ⟶ V_ij` and reassociates the iterated pullbacks via the pseudofunctor
44	comparison `Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp`. The three scheme-level `glueData_bridge_*`
45	identities below (consequences of `t_fac`, `pullback.condition` and `cocycle`) line up the
46	endpoints of the three transports so that the cocycle equation is well typed. -/
47	
48	/-- **Base-change transport of a transition isomorphism along a morphism**
49	(`lem:modules_pullback_basechange_transport`). Given a transition isomorphism
50	`g : a^*Mᵢ ≅ b^*Mⱼ` over `V` and a morphism `p : W ⟶ V`, transport it to `W` as an
51	isomorphism `(p ≫ a)^*Mᵢ ≅ (p ≫ b)^*Mⱼ`, by pulling `g` back along `p` and reassociating
52	the iterated pullbacks through `Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp`.
53	
54	Project-local: this is the pullback-pseudofunctor packaging that lets the three transition
55	isomorphisms attached to a triple of charts be compared on a single triple overlap; Mathlib
56	has no descent-of-modules-over-a-scheme-glue-datum API. -/
57	noncomputable def pullbackBaseChangeTransport {W V : Scheme.{u}} (p : W ⟶ V)
58	    {Yi Yj : Scheme.{u}} (a : V ⟶ Yi) (b : V ⟶ Yj)
59	    {Mi : Yi.Modules} {Mj : Yj.Modules}
60	    (g : (Scheme.Modules.pullback a).obj Mi ≅ (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj Mj) :
61	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (p ≫ a)).obj Mi ≅ (Scheme.Modules.pullback (p ≫ b)).obj Mj :=
62	  (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp p a).symm.app Mi ≪≫
63	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).mapIso g ≪≫
64	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp p b).app Mj
65	
66	/-- Triple-overlap bridge (source): on `V_ijk = V_ij ×_{U_i} V_ik` the two projections to
67	`V_ij` and `V_ik` followed by the overlap immersions `f_ij`, `f_ik` agree as morphisms to
68	`U_i`. This is the pullback condition; it identifies the sources of the `ij`- and
69	`ik`-transports. Project-local helper for the module cocycle (C2). -/

71	    pullback.fst (D.f i j) (D.f i k) ≫ D.f i j
72	      = pullback.snd (D.f i j) (D.f i k) ≫ D.f i k := pullback.condition
